Screenshot 2026-02-23 at 4.38.22 PM.png 209 KB View full-size Download
_______
this week:
Engineering Work
Debugged Apple Pay Express Checkout not working in Safari — found previous "fix" was wrong, got transactions succeeding with correct onBehalfOf, still resolving a duplicate transaction issue
Reviewed PRs (Marcelo's recurring gifts tab, Dylan's subscription/idempotency work)
Triaged web giving QA feedback — nothing launch-blocking besides Apple Pay
Moved reconciliation dashboard into recon issues project, cleaned up Linear
Advocated for reproducible seed scripts for local testing of admin features
Helped Zach with staging environment setup for PCO integration
Participated in project-oriented dev standups (Thu + Fri)
Organizational / Leadership
Ran "mini retros" — had 1:1s with Brandon, Gerry, Darryl, Conrad, and Vance about team process issues
Raised concerns about lack of planning, micromanagement, and team being rudderless
Called out admin UI inconsistency problem in standup — assigned to write a proposal
Pushed for a formal engineering retrospective (Gerry + Brandon committed to scheduling one)
Shared feedback in company connect on PR review bottlenecks, standup effectiveness, and need for better shaping
